'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 49''' was the forty-ninth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[December 4]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The Search for Amidala's Assassin
*[[Clawdite/Legends|Clawdites]]
*[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]
*[[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] - [[Varykino/Legends|Varykino]] Lakeside Retreat
*[[LIN demolitionmech autonomous minelayer/Legends|LIN Demolitionmech]]
*[[Galaxy Gun]]
*[[Owen Lars/Legends|Owen Lars]]' Speeder Bike
